testCase.name: enrich-thinking.util enables thinking for stem content profiles
enrich-thinking.util disables thinking for english upload subjects even with mixed profile
enrich-thinking.util disables thinking for english content domains
enrich-thinking.util falls back to stem upload subject when profile is missing
enrich-thinking.util matches known stem subject names
enrich-thinking.util formats enabled and disabled log lines
content-profile.util normalizes invalid reasoningEffort values to undefined
content-profile.util salvages english-style content profiles without reasoning effort
content-profile.util defaults reasoning effort to high for stem profiles that omit effort
content-profile.util classifies stem and non-stem upload subjects
